title: EKCD: an EKC-derived ontology in OWL/Turtle for extensible Korean cultural heritage knowledge modeling
description: EKCD is an EKC-derived ontology in OWL/Turtle for extensible Korean cultural heritage knowledge modeling. It is designed as a derivative ontology line that builds on the EKC core ontology while providing extended local guidance for semantic mapping and date-oriented modeling. Current stable release: EKCD v1.0.4.

contributors.name: The Center for Digital Humanities at the Academy of Korean Studies
